LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ANDREA NATTA, L.A.C'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. THE DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS DUPLICATIVE OF THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION. THE DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT ALLEGE FACTS ESTABLISHING EXTREME OR OUTRAGEOUS BEHAVIOR. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CALLAN W. FRANKLIN OF CARROLL, KELLY, TROTTER, TEL. NO. 1-562-432-5855 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANDREA NATTA, L.A.C'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress fails because Plaintiff does not plead conduct so "extreme as to exceed all bounds of that usually tolerated in a civilized society." (Hughes v. Pair (2009) 36 Cal.4th 1035, 1050-51.) Even accepting Plaintiff's allegations that Defendant Natta left her alone for 1 hour while performing acupuncture treatment does not rise to the level of intentional infliction of emotional distress. Plaintiff was given a previous opportunity to amend to show outrageous behavior, and has not done so. Order signed in open court. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Continued To Sep-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Callan W. Franklin, of Carroll, Kelly, Trotter, Franzen, McKenna & Peabody, Tel. 562.432.5855, for defendants, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ANDREA NATTA, L.A.C'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is Sustained. The demurrer to the second cause of action for Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff concedes that this cause of action is duplicative of the negligence cause of action. The demurrer to the third cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The complaint does not allege facts establishing extreme or outrageous behavior. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H.
